name: David Ostwald's Louis Armstrong Eternity Band
description: Inspired by the noble jazz pioneers Louis Armstrong, Bix Beiderbecke, Duke Ellington, Jelly Roll Morton and their colleagues, David Ostwalds Louis Armstrong Eternity Band breathes life and passion into Americas own great art form. Now in its 21st year of residency at Birdland, the weekly engagement is the citys best musical bargain! Tuba player David Ostwald leads a rotating lineup of the best hot jazz players in NYC.
